name: csnl-paper-archive-interview
description: CSNL paper-archive interview + downstream priming. Three researcher-facing commands: (1) paper-interview — interactive MCQ walk of the per-researcher top-N queue, persists choices to Postgres archive_*; (2) paper-weekly — pulls this week's auto-generated top-5 unread-paper batch; (3) paper-blitz — pulls the upcoming Wednesday Paper Blitz (lab 5-min journal club) assignment; (4) paper-context — primes any Claude session with the researcher's accumulated research context (projects, fingerprint vocabulary, dim_preferences, recent reads / will-reads / exclusions) so subsequent retrieval is fast and accurate.
